name: 08c · Unwired Failure (panics)
description: Regression fixture for the panic-on-unconnected-failure feature. An AutomatedStep that always raises, with its `error` handle LEFT DANGLING (no failure-path edge). Pre-feature this dead-ended silently and the instance hung at 'running' forever; post-feature the unhandled failure crashes the net (NetFailed) once retries are exhausted, so the instance flips to 'failed'. Compare with 08-failure-handling, which wires the error handle and completes with a structured envelope.
